mapper.insert: insert into teacher_users (username, password, name, gender, create_time, update_time, teacher_user_id, department_id, teacher_type) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{teacherUserId}, #{departmentId}, #{teacherType})
mapper.update:
update teacher_users
password = #{password},
name = #{name},
gender = #{gender},
department_id = #{departmentId},
teacher_user_id = #{teacherUserId},
teacher_type = #{teacherType},
role = #{role},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from teacher_users
and teacher_user_id like concat('%',#{teacherUserId},'%')
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and department_id = #{departmentId}
order by update_time desc
mapper.insert:
insert into teacher_users (username, password, name, gender, create_time, update_time, teacher_user_id, department_id, teacher_type) values
(#{teacherUser.username}, #{teacherUser.password}, #{teacherUser.name}, #{teacherUser.gender}, #{teacherUser.createTime}, #{teacherUser.updateTime}, #{teacherUser.teacherUserId}, #{teacherUser.departmentId}, #{teacherUser.teacherType})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM teacher_users WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM teacher_users WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from teacher_users where teacher_type = #{teacherType} and status = 1 order by name asc
